packageRules.description: Home Assistant version cluster: homeassistant-stubs (dev) and pytest-homeassistant-custom-component (test) each pin an EXACT HA core version and must resolve to the same HA. Group them so Renovate re-resolves uv.lock ONCE per branch (atomic joint resolution) and lands one PR per HA release. Left for manual review (no automerge) because it moves the tested HA version.

homeassistant is the deliberate minimum-supported runtime floor (kept in step with hacs.json), not the dev/test version; pytest is pinned transitively by pytest-hacc. Neither should get its own version PR.
glinet4 is a git dependency tracking the library's main branch (a deliberate canary); its commit is refreshed by lockFileMaintenance, so it needs no dedicated version PR.

Lint/type dev tooling: bundle into one PR and auto-merge non-major bumps. The required checks (prek + pytest) gate every merge, so a bump that breaks lint/types/tests never lands; majors get their own PR for review.
GitHub Actions: bundle and auto-merge non-major bumps (Actions stay digest-pinned via helpers:pinGitHubActionDigests; CI gates the merge). Majors get their own PR for review.
